title: HCIE Audit Event
description: Payload shape accepted by AuditSinkProtocol.record(). The four required fields are the minimum every adapter must capture; structured fields appear under additionalProperties.

actor.description: Subject performing the action. Typically 'user:<id>', 'service:<name>', or 'role:<role>'.

action.description: Verb performed. Examples: read, write, grant, revoke, login, replay.

resource.description: URN or glob identifying the target. Examples: 'experiment/E-1234', 'session/abc/runtime'.

outcome.description: Final disposition of the access check.

policy.description: Name of the authorizer that produced the outcome. Optional.

trace_id.description: Correlation id for distributed tracing. Optional.
